name: Dimensions Analytics API
description: The Dimensions Analytics API provides programmatic access to the Dimensions research database using the Dimensions Search Language (DSL). The API supports complex analytical queries across publications, grants, patents, clinical trials, and policy documents. Rate limited to 30 requests per IP address per minute.
